name: hormozi-offers
description: Operationalize Alex Hormozi's $100M Offers framework. Score any offer with the Value Equation (1–1,000,000), build irresistible Grand Slam Offers using the 8-layer stack (Delivery Cube, MAGIC naming, 14 guarantee types), and build proof stacks using the $100M Proof Hierarchy. Commands: /hormozi-offers:score-offer, /hormozi-offers:build-offer, /hormozi-offers:name-offer, /hormozi-offers:build-proof.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — Value Equation Scorer, Grand Slam Offer Builder (8-layer), MAGIC Naming Engine, Proof Stack Builder. Source: $100M Offers + $100M Proof Checklist + 7 Course Checklists.
